calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alvin Buchignani for and with Joseph Bencharsky (Petitioner).

Mr. Buchignani addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes, explained the need for the bookkeeping fees being seperate from the Trustee's fees and the extent of services provided to support the fee requests. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Felicia Smith.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting By The Former Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Account Of Prior Trustee (Jennie Arconti)
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Trustee and the Attorney for failure to file the accounting. The return date is August 12, 2008.

Judge: Raymond Arata. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee Following Regination Of Current Trustee.
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alvin Buchignani for Jennie Arconti. John Gigounas for the Holy Trinity Greek Orthodox Church.

Mr. Gigounas requested an accounting and stated that his client may waive bond if he was able to review the accounting. Mr. Buchignani stated that the bond requested was $1,600,000.00. The court informed Mr. Buchignani that the accounting was due by July 1, 2008. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.

Petition Of Trustee For Approval Of First And Second Accounting, Including Approval Of Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Of Trustee For Approval Of First And Second Accounting, Including Approval Of Trustee
Off Calendar May-14-2007 Continued To Jun-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Gigounas appearing for petitioner. Alvin Buchignani appearing for trustee. Joseph Bencharsky appearing with POA for the trustee. On petition for instructions, tentative ruling is petition is denied. Trust management is governed by the trust not by CCP 840. Oral argument presented by Mr. Gigounas. Court's tentative ruling stands. Petition for instructions is denied. CCP 840 does not apply to management of trust.
On the trustee's accounting, Mr. Gigounas wants to look into the accounting. Matter is continued to 6/4. If no objection is filed by 5/29, Court will approve the accounting.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Gena Eales CSR# 9176. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar May-14-2007 Denied

Petition For Determination That A Proposed Petition For Instructions...(Probate Code Section 21320); And Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alvin Buchignani (Counsel for Jennie Arconti, Trustee, and Joseph Bucharsky, Attorney-in-Fact for Jennie Arconti, Trustee); John Gigounas (Counsel for the Holy Trinty Greek Orthodox Church, Petitioner); Joseph Bucharsky (Attorney-in-Fact for Jennie Arconti, Trustee).

At the outset, the Court addressed various issues raised by the Court Examiner including notice of the hearing on the accounting petition, the status of an alleged memorandum of distribution, and a cover sheet for the original bank statements. However, at Mr. Gigounas' request and upon further explanation, the "No Contest Clause" petition was addressed in substance first. After some discussion, the Court granted the Petition for Determination that a proposed Petition for Instructions by the Church would not constitute a violation of the "no contest clause" provisions of the trust, signing the Order for same in open court.

Inasmuch as the proposed Petition for Instructions could impact the matters to be approved by the accountings, the Court continued the hearing on the accountings to May 14, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Gigounas was instructed to set, and the Courtroom Clerk is instructed to approve, that same date for the hearing on the Petition for Instructions prior to filing the same with the Window Clerk in Room 103.

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

Petition Of Trustee For Approval Of First And Second Accounting, Including Approval Of Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Continued To May-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Continued To Mar-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
